text_translation_received: Text translation received — block mode recommended
view_translations_title: View saved translation versions (languages, history, side-by-side compare)
no_original: No original source — this chapter was created directly in the editor (no file was imported).

discard_confirm.title: Discard changes?
discard_confirm.desc: All unsaved changes will be permanently lost. This cannot be undone.

media.placeholder: Describe this media for AI context and generation...
media.stored_note: Stored with media for AI context and re-generation.

image.err_type: Unsupported type: {{type}}. Use PNG, JPG, GIF, or WebP.
image.err_size: File too large: {{size}} MB. Max 10 MB.
image.upload_unavailable: Upload not available — save the chapter first.
image.regen_save_first: Save the chapter first to enable AI generation.
image.regen_no_model: No AI model configured. Add a provider in Settings.
image.regen_no_provider: No active AI provider. Configure one in Settings → Providers.
image.drop_hint: Drop an image, click to browse, or Ctrl+V
image.formats: PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP — Max 10 MB
image.alt_placeholder: Describe this image for screen readers and EPUB export...
image.alt_note: Used by screen readers, search, and EPUB export. Different from caption.

video.err_type: Unsupported type: {{type}}. Use MP4 or WebM.
video.err_size: File too large: {{size}} MB. Max 100 MB.
video.upload_unavailable: Upload not available — save the chapter first.
video.gen_no_model: No video generation model configured. Add one in Settings > Providers.
video.drop_hint: Drop a video or click to browse
video.alt_placeholder: Describe this video for screen readers and EPUB export...
video.alt_note: Used by screen readers, search, and EPUB export. Different from caption.

audio.err_type: Unsupported type: {{type}}. Use MP3, WAV, OGG, WebM, or M4A.
audio.err_size: File too large: {{size}} MB. Max 20 MB.
audio.upload_unavailable: Upload not available — save the chapter first.
audio.drop_hint: Drop an audio file or click to browse
audio.formats: MP3, WAV, OGG, WebM, M4A — Max 20 MB

revision.empty: No revisions yet. Save to create one.
revision.confirm_desc: This will overwrite your current draft with this older version and create a new revision entry. This cannot be undone.

source.header: Block JSON — read-only view of chapter structure

version.title: Version History
version.delete_confirm: Delete version {{version}}? This cannot be undone.

media_guard.protected: Media blocks are protected in Classic mode. Switch to AI mode to edit or delete.

publish.confirm_body: This takes the chapter out of canon. It stays in your knowledge graph — to remove it from there, use “Forget this chapter”.
publish.conflict_toast: Draft changed since you opened it — reload before publishing.
publish.empty_toast: This chapter has no content to publish — write something first.
publish.gate_no_scenes: Create and complete at least one scene to publish
publish.gate_canon_blocked: an unresolved canon contradiction in {{count}} scene(s)
publish.gate_unchecked_hint: These scenes have characters to check but no resolved reading-order position, so canon was not verified. Publishing is allowed — review them if you can.

knowledge.reused_toast: Already up to date — nothing changed
knowledge.empty_toast: This chapter has no content to add — write something first.
knowledge.excluded_toast: This chapter is kept out of your knowledge — allow it first.
knowledge.allowed_toast: Allowed. Choose “Add to knowledge” when you're ready.
knowledge.failed_toast: Couldn't update your knowledge — try again.
knowledge.forget_confirm_body: Everything learned from this chapter will be removed from your knowledge. The chapter itself is not deleted, and you can add it back later.
knowledge.hint: Adding a chapter to your knowledge lets the assistant use it. You don't have to publish it.

compare.title: Compare revisions
compare.need_two: This chapter needs at least two saved revisions to compare.
compare.truncated: These revisions are very large — showing a full replace instead of a fine-grained diff.
compare.same: Both sides are the same revision — no differences.
compare.load_more_hint: Load older revisions into the picker

checkpoint.restored: Restored to before the AI edit
checkpoint.no_restore: No earlier version to restore to
checkpoint.confirm_title: Restore to before this AI edit?
checkpoint.confirm_desc: The current draft is snapshotted first, so this is reversible from the revision history.
